title: No Water for 30 Hours? Parts of Mumbai Will Face Major Supply Cut In May; Check Date, Affected Areas
description: The Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) has scheduled a 30-hour water supply shutdown from May 5 at 10 am to May 6 at 4 pm, 2026, for essential maintenance and water tunnel connection works. The affected areas include Pratiksha Nagar, Shastri Nagar, Sanjay Gandhi Nagar, and others.
